nasb.text: Jesus answered and said to him, “Are you the teacher of Israel and do not understand these things?

esv.text: Jesus answered him, “Are you the teacher of Israel and yet you do not understand these things?

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“你是以色列人的教師，還不明白這事嗎？

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“你是以色列人的教师，还不明白这事吗？

csbs.text: 耶稣回答说：“你是以色列的老师，还不明白这些事吗？
